'''Smekt''' was a female Noghri who worked as a clerk for [[Hyperspeed Express]] on [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]]. [[Dal Konur]] used a [[The Force/Legends|Force]] [[Mind trick/Legends|mind trick]] on her, and impersonating the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Streen]], convinced the Noghri to help him in his goals of acquiring cargo and a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].

==Appearances==
